links.description: This book is not meant to be a language reference, but a tool for Android developers to learn Kotlin and be able to continue with their own projects by themselves.

links.title: Kotlin in Action (MEAP)
links.description: Kotlin in Action takes experienced Java developers from the language basics all the way through building applications to run on the JVM and Android devices.

links.title: Effective Kotlin

links.title: Kotlin Blueprints
links.description: a practical guide to help build industry grade web applications (Spring Boot, JavaScript, Node.js), Android, Desktop application using TornadoFX. It also includes building an application with Kotlin Native. It shows how to leverage features of Kotlin in the respective technologies.
